testcase.name: test_consolidated_page_navigate_to_autocomplete

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:23: in test_consolidated_page_navigate_to_autocomplete page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Autocomplete")]').click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: E 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") E 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) E E Call log: E - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.name: test_consolidated_page_check_checkboxes

testcase.name: test_consolidated_page_file_upload_reset_button

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_03

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/buttons')' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1_cdbd/test_page_1_cdbd.py:33: in test_TC_Navigation_03 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"/buttons")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/buttons')' E Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete"
